title: SpecReviewOutput
description: Structured return from spec-reviewer agent — verdict + findings, never a spec rewrite.

doc_path.description: Absolute path to the produced spec-review.md.

verdict.description: APPROVED: spec ready for implementation. REVISIONS NEEDED: targeted fixes by spec-writer (continue iteration loop). REJECTED: design is fundamentally flawed; pivot-protocol or stop.

dimensions_scored.description: Score 0-1 per quality dimension. The spec-reviewer enforces all 8 dimensions; partial scoring fails the gate.
